name: unambiguous
grammar:
start: sum
?sum: product
    | sum "+" product   -> add
?product: atom
        | product "*" atom -> mul
atom: NUMBER
NUMBER: /[0-9]+/
%ignore " "

cases.error:
Unexpected end-of-input. Expected one of: 
	* NUMBER

Unexpected end-of-input. Expected one of: 
	* NUMBER

name: right_rec
grammar:
start: a
a: X a | X
X: "x"

cases.error:
Unexpected end-of-input. Expected one of: 
	* X
	* X

cases.error:

name: right_rec_nullable
grammar:
start: a
a: X a | empty
empty:
X: "x"

name: right_rec_nullable
grammar:
start: a
a: X a | empty
empty:
X: "x"

name: right_rec_transparent
grammar:
start: a
a: X _tail | X
_tail: a
X: "x"

name: right_rec_transparent

_tail: a
X: "x"

name: right_rec_ambig
grammar:
start: a | b
a: X a | X
b: X b | X
X: "x"

name: right_rec_ambig
grammar:
start: a | b
a: X a | X
b: X b | X
X: "x"
